STS1TO2CARD-RED_IRONCLAD.cardsModifierDe: Ironclad cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
STS1TO2CARD-RED_IRONCLAD.description:
[red]One-Man Army[/red]: First-generation card pool.
A surviving soldier of the Ironclad legion.
He sold his soul to harness demonic powers.
STS1TO2CARD-RED_IRONCLAD.title: Ironclad
STS1TO2CARD-RED_IRONCLAD.unlockText: Play a run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
STS1TO2CARD-RED_IRONCLAD_AWAKENED.cardsM: Ironclad cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
STS1TO2CARD-RED_IRONCLAD_AWAKENED.descri:
[red]I Am Awakened[/red]: First & Second-generation card pools.
A surviving soldier of the Ironclad legion.
He sold his soul to harness demonic powers, crushing enemies with steel and flame.
STS1TO2CARD-RED_IRONCLAD_AWAKENED.title: Ironclad
STS1TO2CARD-RED_IRONCLAD_AWAKENED.unlock: Play a run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
STS1TO2CARD-GREEN_SILENT.cardsModifierDe: Silent cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
STS1TO2CARD-GREEN_SILENT.description:
[green]Mist Phantom[/green]: First-generation card pool.
A deadly huntress from the foglands.
She eliminates her enemies with daggers and poison.
STS1TO2CARD-GREEN_SILENT.title: Silent
STS1TO2CARD-GREEN_SILENT.unlockText: Play a run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
STS1TO2CARD-GREEN_SILENT_AWAKENED.cardsM: Silent cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
STS1TO2CARD-GREEN_SILENT_AWAKENED.descri:
[green]I Am Awakened[/green]: First & Second-generation card pools.
A deadly huntress from the foglands beyond the Spire.
She eliminates her enemies with daggers and poison.
STS1TO2CARD-GREEN_SILENT_AWAKENED.title: Silent
STS1TO2CARD-GREEN_SILENT_AWAKENED.unlock: Play a run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
STS1TO2CARD-BLUE_DEFECT.cardsModifierDes: Defect cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
STS1TO2CARD-BLUE_DEFECT.description:
[blue]Ancient Construct[/blue]: First-generation card pool.
A combat automaton from a forgotten era.
It manipulates orbs and channels elemental energy.
STS1TO2CARD-BLUE_DEFECT.title: Defect
STS1TO2CARD-BLUE_DEFECT.unlockText: Play a run with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
